vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is experiencing a critical failure. The P3 Pothos (anchor) and P2/P4 specimens have vanished from the visual field, leaving only empty soil and debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (White rabbit anchor present, but host plant is gone)
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No evidence of Silver Guest)

plant_audit.P1: Pot is empty; soil surface appears undisturbed but devoid of vegetation.
plant_audit.P2: Pot is empty; no signs of Mexican Mint or Silver Guest.
plant_audit.P3: The white rabbit anchor remains, but the Pothos specimen has been removed or has completely withered/collapsed below the soil line.
plant_audit.P4: Integrated into P2/P3 space; no trace of plant matter.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all visible pots.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of white, calcified fragments (likely crushed eggshells) in the black pot, serving as a persistent anomaly.
biome_observations.surface_conditions: No incidental growth, moss, or fungal activity detected.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-2: Gradual loss of leaf turgor and eventual disappearance of the primary Pothos stem.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Total environmental blackout; the specimens have been removed from the frame or have suffered total senescence.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. The absence of all registered botanical specimens suggests either a total harvest, a catastrophic die-off, or a complete relocation of the subjects.
anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in the black pot.
Total removal of all plant matter from the pots.
White rabbit anchor is now isolated in an empty pot.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a transition from a populated botanical desk to a state of total biological vacancy. The Pothos, which was the most prominent specimen, has been removed or lost. The remaining pots are empty, and the lighting conditions have shifted to a low-visibility state, rendering the desk surface nearly indistinguishable from the background. The white rabbit remains as a solitary, non-biological sentinel in an otherwise empty biome.
